zones.source_citation: Chapter 2 - Residential Zones, Sec. 2.1, Table 2.1 & Table 2.2
zones.notes: Reachable via official per-chapter PDF (Ch.2, eff. 12/4/25, Ord. O2025-13). Front and rear both 60 (single combined column); side 30. Coverage 10%; total disturbance cap 75%. One dwelling per lot; no FAR in code.

zones.source_citation: Chapter 2 - Residential Zones, Sec. 2.1, Table 2.1 & Table 2.2
zones.notes: Front and rear both 60; side 30. Coverage 10%; total disturbance cap 75%. One dwelling per lot; no FAR in code.

zones.source_citation: Chapter 2 - Residential Zones, Sec. 2.1, Table 2.1 & Table 2.2
zones.notes: Front and rear both 60; side 30. Coverage 10%; total disturbance cap 75%. One dwelling per lot; no FAR in code.

zones.source_citation: Chapter 2 - Residential Zones, Sec. 2.1, Table 2.1 & Table 2.2
zones.notes: Front and rear both 40; side 20. Coverage 15%; total disturbance cap 75%. One dwelling per lot; no FAR in code.

zones.source_citation: Chapter 2 - Residential Zones, Sec. 2.2, Table 2.3 & Table 2.4
zones.notes: Front and rear both 40; side 20. Coverage 20%; total disturbance cap 75%. One dwelling per lot; no FAR in code.

zones.source_citation: Chapter 2 - Residential Zones, Sec. 2.2, Table 2.3 & Table 2.4
zones.notes: Front and rear both 30. Side: interior 10 (binding), street 20. Coverage 25%; total disturbance cap 75%. One dwelling per lot; no FAR in code.

zones.source_citation: Chapter 2 - Residential Zones, Sec. 2.3, Table 2.5 & Table 2.6
zones.notes: Front 20, rear 25. Side: interior 5 (binding), street 20. Coverage 50% (40% hillside); total disturbance cap 65-75% by parcel size. No max dua in code (multi-family by Site Plan Review).

standards.parking_ratio: Office/Retail 1 per 250 gsf; Restaurant 1 per 200 gsf; Industrial 1 per 500 gsf (Table 3.9)

zones.source_citation: Chapter 3 - Commercial Zones, Sec. 3.1, Table 3.1 & Table 3.2
zones.notes: Setbacks front 15/rear 5/side 5 are binding minimums; all increase to 25 where abutting DR/residential zones or street/alley. Coverage 60% (40% hillside); total disturbance cap 65-75%. No FAR in code.

standards.parking_ratio: Office/Retail 1 per 250 gsf; Restaurant 1 per 200 gsf (Table 3.9)

zones.source_citation: Chapter 3 - Commercial Zones, Sec. 3.2, Table 3.3 & Table 3.4
zones.notes: Town Core pedestrian-oriented district (Cave Creek Rd core). Setbacks front 15/rear 5/side 5 binding; all increase to 25 where abutting DR/residential or street/alley. Coverage 60% (40% hillside). No FAR in code.

standards.parking_ratio: Office/Retail 1 per 250 gsf; Restaurant 1 per 200 gsf; Industrial 1 per 500 gsf (Table 3.9)

zones.source_citation: Chapter 3 - Commercial Zones, Sec. 3.3, Table 3.5 & Table 3.6
zones.notes: Allows commercial, service and industrial uses. Setbacks front 15/rear 5/side 5 binding; all increase to 25 where abutting DR/residential or street/alley. Coverage 60% (40% hillside). No FAR in code.

zones.source_citation: Chapter 4 - Open Space Zones, Sec. 4.1, Table 4.1 & Table 4.2
zones.notes: Chapter 4 eff. 12/22/2011. No min lot area/width specified for open space zones (TBD). Setbacks 60 all yards. Coverage 1%; total disturbance cap 2%. No FAR or parking ratio in code.

zones.source_citation: Chapter 4 - Open Space Zones, Sec. 4.1, Table 4.1 & Table 4.2
zones.notes: No min lot area/width specified (TBD). Setbacks 60 all yards. Coverage 2%; total disturbance cap 4%. No FAR or parking ratio in code.

zones.source_citation: Chapter 4 - Open Space Zones, Sec. 4.1, Table 4.1 & Table 4.2
zones.notes: No min lot area/width specified (TBD). Setbacks 60 all yards. Coverage 4%; total disturbance cap 6%. No FAR or parking ratio in code.
